rulings.Case Title: TREMEWAN VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: DENY DEFENDANT E.V. ROBERTS & ASSOCIATES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. BURDEN NOT SHIFTED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT RE DECEDENTS EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS FROM DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS AT KAISER. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: ENVIRONMENTAL VS CA DEPT OF PESTICIDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Writ Of Mandate;
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. NO NEW FACTS OR LAW. PURSUANT TO CCP 128(a)(8), COURT AMENDS PARAGRAPH 4 OF THE 4/9/02 ORDER GRANTING THE AGRICULTURAL PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE ORDER SHOULD STATE THAT "ENVIRONMENTAL DEFENSE CENTER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS MOOT." WHETHER OR NOT EDC'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF ARE MOOT OR IMPROPERLY SEEK ADVISORY OPINIONS NEEDS TO BE RESOLVED AT A LATER PROCEEDING. THE PRIOR HEARING ONLY PERTAINED TO THE PETITIONS FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND THE COURT DID NOT ADJUDICATE THE VIABILITY OF THE OTHER CLAIMS. (PB)
